title: Vault <-> Connectors UI (registry, Vault-sealed badges, OAuth health, audit, rotation)

implement.detail: src/lib/connectors-view.ts (pure buildConnectorsView: sealed status from scoped-secret NAMES present / OAuth health; statusKnown=false when vault unreadable); GET /api/connectors (library+vaultView names-only+oauthHealth), GET /api/vault/audit, POST /api/connectors/[id]/revoke; src/app/connectors/page.tsx + ConnectorsPanel.tsx (Vault-sealed marquee, auth/action/mutating/trigger chips, scoped-secret present/missing chips by NAME, OAuth health + Revoke, vault access log); Sidebar Connectors link (Plug). No secret VALUE on any path.

test.detail: connectors-view (6: api_key all-present sealed / partial not-sealed, no-value-leak, oauth valid/expired/revoked, counts, locked->unknown, non-connector ignored). typecheck + eslint clean.

codexReview.detail: R1 (high): a locked/unreadable vault rendered as 'all secrets missing / not connected' -> added statusKnown tri-state (route flags vault.locked; UI shows 'Status unknown' + banner, gates detail). R2: approve — honest unknown state, no value leakage.

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 shows the Vault-sealed Google connector
